description: Navigate to the 'Add Friend' section of Flight Crew View and document the error messages for two specific failure cases. For a malformed email input ('this-is-not-an-email') and a non-existent user input ('ghost_user_999@example.com'), record the exact error messages displayed. Save the results to /sdcard/error_comparison.txt with the headers 'Malformed Input Error:' and 'Non-existent User Error:'.
